news.t: Pacer ETFs Kicks Off 2026 with Launch of Two New Quality Free Cash Flow-Focused ETFs, One International Growth Fund, and the Expansion of the Sales Management Team

holdings.infoBox: QFHD is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Parcel Service stock at 2.36%, Best Buy Co. at 2.26%, The Campbell's Company at 2.19%, T. Rowe Price Group at 2.17%, and Prudential Financial at 2.13%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P 500 Quality FCF High Dividend ETF (QFHD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Quality FCF High Dividend index. The fund is passive, tracking an index of 100 large-cap US companies with high dividend yield, cash generation, and capital efficiency. The fund excludes securities from the real estate and financial sectors. QFHD was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: S&P 500 Quality FCF High Dividend Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Kicks Off 2026 with Launch of Two New Quality Free Cash Flow-Focused ETFs, One International Growth Fund, and the Expansion of the Sales Management Team
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $PIEL #ETF--Pacer ETFs kicks off 2026 with new free cash flow ETFs, international growth fund, after year of continued growth in 2025.
